similarity.label_zh: 互联网泡沫顶前 9 个月
互联网泡沫顶前 1 个月

summary.verdict_desc: 本周计数 6 红 / 6 黄 / 12 绿，红灯比例由上周 29.2% 回落至 25.0%，加权风险分由 41.7% 降至 37.5%——上周宏观侧的风险上移本周部分回吐。核心变化是资本开支指引市场反应（capex_reaction）由'系统性惩罚'转回'奖励'：6/22–27 那轮 AI 板块回调在 Q2 末已完全反转，晨星口径 Q2 美股大盘指数 +15.52%、AI 交易强势复苏领涨，费城半导体指数年内 +47%、纳米科技指数 15 年来最大 +99.25% 单季涨幅；进入 7 月 AI 芯片股再添约 2 万亿美元市值，'资本开支海啸'重新被市场奖励而非惩罚，由红转绿（两级下调），是本周风险回落的主因。但结构性隐患未消：Fed 政策方向仍为'隐含加息'——期货路径显示利率年内升向约 4%（当前 3.50–3.75%）、18 名委员中 9 人预期年内至少加息一次、新任主席 Warsh 反复强调'价格稳定'，7 月会议约 75.6% 维持但向量向上，维持红灯。估值依旧极度拉伸：CAPE 约 40.5（multpl 41.6、GuruFocus 39.5）、前 5 大权重约 28.4%（NVDA 7.32 / AAPL 7.04 / GOOGL 5.89 / MSFT 4.50 / AMZN 3.69），唯 NVDA 远期 PE 约 22x 维持绿灯。资金面仍是最大压力源：Mag4 自由现金流深度转负（Amazon 全年 -$17B~-$28B、Alphabet 料骤降约 90% 至 $8.2B、MSFT -28%），AI 占 VC 比重 Q2 约 70%（较 Q1 的 80% 回落但仍远超 50% 红线，H1 全球创投创纪录 $510B），NVDA 客户投资/收入约 43%（$40B+ 股权承诺含 OpenAI $30B，循环融资特征依旧）。信用面继续最强支撑：HY 利差约 263bps（较上周 278 进一步收窄、远低于均值）、数据中心 ABS 条件宽松发行火热、Neocloud 90 日零信用事件（但 CoreWeave 总债务升至 $14B、未来 12 个月 $9.7B 到期，再融资墙为潜在隐患）。基本面持续兑现：OpenRouter 月 token 量稳在约 100 万亿、Anthropic 5 月 run-rate 约 $47B（Series H 以 $965B 估值落定、YoY 约 1400%）领先 OpenAI $25–33B，token/收入比值 <1x、云厂商 RPO 强劲。基础判读为'中度警戒'（red_pct 25.0% 恰落 25–40% 区间下沿），但分类强制升级再次生效：估值 2/3 红（CAPE、Top-5）叠加资金面 3/4 红（FCF 深负、VC AI 占比、NVDA 客户投资），估值 + 资金面双类共振触发分类强制升级，最终判读维持'高风险预警'。（2026-07-06 框架升级：本期起启用两轴判读——泡沫成熟度 stage 60/100（亢奋段：估值、VC 集中度、vendor financing 均已泡沫化），破裂临近度 trigger 21/100（引线未燃：信用利差收窄、广度中性、算力租价紧俏），一句话：'泡沫已大、引线未燃'。与四个历史顶部时点比对，当前格局最像 1999-06（顶前 9 个月，相似度 83%）而非 2000-02（顶前 1 个月，73%）——差距集中在四个信号：信用利差未走阔、市场广度未崩、内部人减持未达极端、IPO 未成洪流，它们就是从'1999 年中'走向'2000 年初'的确认清单。指标口径微调：移出 SPY/RSP 6 月差与 Token/收入比（信息冗余），纳入 GPU 租赁现货价与 AI 私募二级标价两个盲区指标；同日增设第 25 个指标「前沿模型能力进展」——本轮周期特有的 capex 第一性验证（模型持续变好=需求叙事完好，进展停滞=本轮独有的顶部触发器）。当前该指标为绿：METR 时程倍增时间缩至约 3 个月、HLE 榜首季内 45.7%→53.3%、FrontierMath 破 52%、ARC-AGI-2 上 70%，进展在加速而非放缓。注意分母由 24 变 25，红灯比例 25.0%→24.0% 为纯分母效应、非风险回落，判读经共振升级规则维持「高风险预警」不变。）
summary.verdict_desc_en: This week prints 6 red / 6 yellow / 12 green, with the red share easing from 29.2% to 25.0% and the weighted risk score falling from 41.7% to 37.5% — last week's macro risk-ward move partly reversed. The key change is the capex-guidance market reaction (capex_reaction) swinging from 'systematic punishment' back to 'rewarded': the June 22-27 AI pullback fully reversed by quarter-end, with Morningstar's US market index up 15.52% in Q2 led by a powerful revival of the AI trade, the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index up 47% YTD, and the Nanotech index posting its largest single-quarter gain in 15 years (+99.25%); into July AI chip stocks added roughly $2T in market value as the 'capex tsunami' is again rewarded rather than punished — flips from red to green (a two-notch move), the main reason risk eased this week. Structural risks persist, though: Fed policy direction is still 'implied hike' — the futures path rises toward ~4% by year-end (from 3.50-3.75% now), 9 of 18 officials pencil at least one 2026 hike, and new Chair Warsh keeps stressing 'price stability'; the July meeting is ~75.6% hold but the vector points up, stays red. Valuations remain extremely stretched: CAPE ~40.5 (multpl 41.6, GuruFocus 39.5) and the Top-5 weight ~28.4% (NVDA 7.32 / AAPL 7.04 / GOOGL 5.89 / MSFT 4.50 / AMZN 3.69); only NVDA's ~22x forward PE stays green. Capital is still the biggest pressure point: Mag4 free cash flow is deeply negative (Amazon -$17B to -$28B for the year, Alphabet set to fall ~90% to $8.2B, MSFT -28%), AI's VC share was ~70% in Q2 (down from Q1's 80% but still far above the 50% red line, with record H1 global VC of $510B), and NVDA customer-financing runs ~43% of revenue ($40B+ of equity commitments incl. $30B in OpenAI, circular-financing hallmarks intact). Credit remains the strongest support: HY OAS ~263bps (tighter than last week's 278, far below average), data-center ABS conditions accommodative amid heavy issuance, and neocloud credit logged zero events in 90 days (though CoreWeave's total debt has risen to $14B with $9.7B of maturities within 12 months, a latent refinancing-wall risk). Fundamentals keep delivering: OpenRouter holds ~100T tokens/month, Anthropic's May run-rate is ~$47B (Series H closed at a $965B valuation, ~1,400% YoY) ahead of OpenAI's $25-33B, the token/revenue ratio is below 1x, and cloud RPO is robust. The base framework reads Moderate Caution (red_pct 25.0%, at the lower edge of the 25-40% band), but the category override fires again: valuation 2/3 RED (CAPE, Top-5) plus capital 3/4 RED (FCF deeply negative, VC AI share, NVDA customer-financing). Valuation + capital dual-category resonance triggers the forced upgrade, holding the verdict at High Risk Alert. (Framework upgrade, 2026-07-06: this issue introduces a two-axis read — bubble maturity 'stage' at 60/100 (Euphoria: valuations, VC concentration and vendor financing are all bubble-grade) versus rupture proximity 'trigger' at 21/100 (fuse unlit: credit spreads tight, breadth neutral, GPU rental prices firm). In one line: the bubble is large, the fuse is not lit. Pattern-matched against four historical tops, today most resembles June 1999 — nine months before the dot-com peak, 83% match — rather than February 2000 (one month before, 73%); the gap sits in four signals — credit spreads have not widened, breadth has not broken, insider selling is not extreme, and the IPO pipeline is not a flood — which together form the checklist for confirming a move from 'mid-1999' to 'early-2000'. Indicator lineup tweak: the SPY/RSP 6-month spread and token/revenue ratio (redundant) rotate out; GPU rental spot price and AI private secondary marks — the framework's two blind spots — rotate in. The same day, a 25th indicator was added at Crystal's request: Frontier Model Progress — this cycle's first-principles check on capex sustainability (models still improving = the demand story holds; a stall would be this cycle's distinctive top trigger). It reads green today: METR's time-horizon doubling time has compressed to ~3 months, the HLE leaderboard jumped from 45.7% to 53.3% within the quarter, FrontierMath crossed 52%, and ARC-AGI-2 topped 70% — progress is accelerating, not slowing. Note the denominator moved from 24 to 25, so the red-light ratio's shift from 25.0% to 24.0% is purely mechanical, not a risk decline; the verdict stays High Risk Alert via the resonance override.)

wow_changes.note: 6/22–27 那轮 AI 回调至 Q2 末已完全反转：晨星 Q2 美股大盘 +15.52%、AI 交易强势复苏领涨，费半年内 +47%、纳米科技指数单季 +99.25%（15 年最大），7 月 AI 芯片股再添约 2 万亿美元市值——市场由'系统性惩罚'转回奖励资本开支，由红转绿
wow_changes.note_en: The June 22-27 AI pullback fully reversed by quarter-end: Morningstar's Q2 US market index rose 15.52% led by a strong AI-trade revival, the SOX is up 47% YTD, the Nanotech index posted its biggest quarterly gain in 15 years (+99.25%), and AI chip stocks added ~$2T in market value in July — the market swung from systematic punishment back to rewarding capex, flips red to green

wow_changes.note: Crunchbase Q2 2026：AI 占全球创投比重由 Q1 的约 80% 回落至约 70%，H1 全球创投仍创纪录 $510B、OpenAI 与 Anthropic 两家占 H1 的 43%；占比略降但仍远超 50% 红线，维持红灯
wow_changes.note_en: Crunchbase Q2 2026: AI's share of global VC eased from ~80% in Q1 to ~70%, even as record H1 global VC hit $510B with OpenAI and Anthropic alone at 43% of the half; the share dipped but stays far above the 50% red line — remains red

indicators.threshold_text_en: >35 red / 25-35 yellow / <25 green
indicators.note: CAPE 约 40.5（multpl 41.6、GuruFocus 39.5、MacroRadar 41.66），随 Q2 大盘反弹小幅回升，仍是 155 年来第 2 高、距 2000 年峰值 44.2 仅约 8%，远高于长期均值约 32，估值处极度拉伸区，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: CAPE sits near 40.5 (multpl 41.6, GuruFocus 39.5, MacroRadar 41.66), edging up with the Q2 rally and still the 2nd-highest in 155 years — only ~8% below the 2000 peak of 44.2 and far above its ~32 long-run average; valuations remain extremely stretched, stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: >25% red / 18-25% yellow / <25% green
indicators.note: S&P 500 前 5 大（NVDA 7.32% / AAPL 7.04% / GOOGL 5.89% / MSFT 4.50% / AMZN 3.69%）合计约 28.4%，与上周基本持平；前 10 大占比逾 37%，集中度仍贴近 2000 年极值，市值高度押注少数 AI 龙头，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: The S&P 500's Top-5 (NVDA 7.32% / AAPL 7.04% / GOOGL 5.89% / MSFT 4.50% / AMZN 3.69%) total ~28.4%, roughly flat on the week; the Top-10 exceed 37% and concentration still hugs the 2000 extreme, with the index heavily bet on a handful of AI leaders — stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: >40 red / 30-40 yellow / <30 green
indicators.note: NVDA 远期 PE 约 22x（GuruFocus 21.85、Yahoo 22.52、FinBox 22.1、StockAnalysis 19.6，区间 19.6–22.5x）；即便股价随 Q2 反弹回升，EPS 持续上修使倍数仍远低于 12 月均值约 43，NVDA 自身估值并非泡沫源头，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: NVDA's forward PE is ~22x (GuruFocus 21.85, Yahoo 22.52, FinBox 22.1, StockAnalysis 19.6; range 19.6-22.5x); even as the stock rebounded through Q2, ongoing EPS upgrades keep the multiple far below its ~43 12-month average — NVDA's own valuation is not the bubble's source, stays green

indicators.name_zh: AI 私募二级市场标价
indicators.threshold_text: 折价/下跌=红 / 溢价收窄+卖压=黄 / 溢价稳定或扩大=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Discount/falling = red / Narrowing premium + sell pressure = yellow / Stable-to-wider premium = green
indicators.note: Forge 二级标价：Anthropic 隐含约 $1T（较 2 月 Series G $380B 溢价 2.6x、约与 Series H $965B 持平），OpenAI 约 $880B（较 $852B primary 溢价仅 ~3%，且 Caplight 报 Q1 卖方意向多于买方）；旗舰标的均无折价、一级市场无退潮信号，但 OpenAI 溢价薄 + 卖压隐现是第一道待观察的裂缝，维持绿灯（2026-07-06 新增）
indicators.note_en: Forge secondary marks: Anthropic's implied valuation is ~$1T (2.6x its February Series G at $380B and roughly at its Series H of $965B), while OpenAI trades near $880B — only ~3% above its $852B primary — with Caplight reporting Q1 sell interest exceeding buy interest; no flagship trades at a discount, so no retreat signal yet, though OpenAI's thin premium and latent sell pressure is the first crack to watch. Green (added 2026-07-06)

indicators.threshold_text: 指引下调=红 / 加速=黄 / 稳健=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Guidance cut = red / Accelerating = yellow / Steady = green
indicators.note: 四大 hyperscaler 2026 capex 合计约 $725B（AMZN $200B、MSFT $190B、GOOGL $175-185B、META $125-145B），YoY +77%，无一下调指引；Q2 市场重新奖励这一'资本开支海啸'、半导体强劲反弹，但绝对增速仍在加速、不可持续特征明显，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: The four hyperscalers guide ~$725B of 2026 capex (AMZN $200B, MSFT $190B, GOOGL $175-185B, META $125-145B), +77% YoY, with none cutting guidance; the market rewarded this 'capex tsunami' again in Q2 and semis rebounded strongly, yet the pace is still accelerating with clear unsustainability hallmarks — stays yellow

indicators.threshold_text_en: <-20% red / -20%~0 yellow / >0 green
indicators.note: 自由现金流被 capex 深度吞噬：Amazon 2026 全年 FCF 料转负（Morgan Stanley -$17B、BofA -$28B），Pivotal 预计 Alphabet FCF 骤降约 90% 至 $8.2B（2025 为 $73.3B），Barclays 估 MSFT -28%；Mag7 叙事由'造现金'转向'吞现金'、需外部融资支撑，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: Free cash flow is being deeply consumed by capex: Amazon's 2026 FCF is set to turn negative (Morgan Stanley -$17B, BofA -$28B), Pivotal sees Alphabet's FCF plunging ~90% to $8.2B (from $73.3B in 2025), and Barclays estimates MSFT -28%; the Mag7 story has shifted from cash generation to cash consumption, leaning on external financing — stays red

indicators.name_zh: AI 占 VC 投资比重
indicators.threshold_text_en: >50% red / 30-50% yellow / <30% green
indicators.note: Crunchbase Q2 2026：AI 占全球创投约 70%（Q1 曾达 80%），H1 全球创投创纪录 $510B（超 2025 全年 $440B），OpenAI 与 Anthropic 两家占 H1 的 43%（$217B）；占比虽自 Q1 高点回落，仍远超 50% 红线、美元高度集中于少数巨额轮次，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: Crunchbase Q2 2026: AI took ~70% of global VC (down from 80% in Q1), with record H1 global VC of $510B (topping all of 2025's $440B) and OpenAI plus Anthropic alone at 43% of the half ($217B); the share eased from its Q1 peak but stays far above the 50% red line as dollars concentrate in a few mega-rounds — stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: >30% red / 15-30% yellow / <15% green (Lucent '99 peak: 24%)
indicators.note: NVDA 2026 年 AI 股权承诺逾 $40B（OpenAI $30B 直投 + CoreWeave/IREN/Corning/Nebius 及二十余笔私募），叠加捆绑的 GPU 采购与抵押融资承诺，占约 $300B LTM 收入约 43%，远超 Lucent 1999 峰值 24%；每笔投资多绑采购协议、循环融资特征显著（$30B 集中于 OpenAI 单一标的风险突出），维持红灯
indicators.note_en: NVDA committed $40B+ of AI equity in 2026 ($30B direct into OpenAI plus CoreWeave/IREN/Corning/Nebius and two dozen private rounds), and with bundled GPU purchase and collateralized-financing commitments that is ~43% of ~$300B LTM revenue — far above Lucent's 1999 peak of 24%; most deals are tied to purchase agreements with clear circular-financing hallmarks ($30B concentrated in a single name, OpenAI), stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: <40% red / 40-60% yellow / >60% green
indicators.note: S5FI 最新可得读数约 55%（6/18 约 55.3，近期区间 54-56），仍落在 40-60% 黄区；Q2 大盘强劲反弹但涨幅集中于头部 AI/芯片股，广度未同步走强，参与度偏中性未触绿，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: S5FI's latest available read is ~55% (≈55.3 on June 18, recent range 54-56), still inside the 40-60% yellow band; the Q2 rally was strong but concentrated in mega-cap AI/chip names so breadth did not broaden with it — participation is neutral, not green, stays yellow

indicators.name_zh: AI 龙头内部人卖买比
indicators.threshold_text_en: >20x = red / 5-20x = yellow / <5x = green (2000 peak: 23x)
indicators.note: AI 硬件链内部人买入近乎消失、以卖为主：NVDA 6 月披露 2 笔卖出约 $1.099 亿、买入几近为零，Huang 等高管沿 10b5-1 计划持续减持；聚合卖买比偏高但仍未及 2000 年 23x 极值，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: Insider buying across the AI-hardware complex has all but vanished and flows stay sell-heavy: NVDA reported ~$109.9M of June sales against near-zero buys, with Huang and other officers continuing to trim under 10b5-1 plans; the aggregate sell/buy ratio is elevated but still below the 2000 extreme of 23x — stays yellow

indicators.threshold_text: 洪流=红 / 升温=黄 / 平静=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Flood = red / Warming = yellow / Quiet = green
indicators.note: 管道继续升温但未成洪流：SpaceX（6/12 挂牌，一度冲高后回吐约 32%）已完成、Anthropic 递交 S-1 仍瞄准 10 月上市（拟 $1T 估值），但 OpenAI 因市场波动与 $1T 底价改口倾向推迟至 2027（Bloomberg 6/26 报道）、Databricks 尚未递表；临近发行的具体公司数仍 <10，SpaceX 上市后波动亦令窗口谨慎，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: The pipeline keeps warming but is short of a flood: SpaceX (listed June 12, spiked then gave back ~32%) is done and Anthropic, having filed its S-1, still targets an October listing (~$1T target), but OpenAI is now leaning to 2027 on market volatility and its $1T price floor (Bloomberg, June 26) and Databricks has not filed; the count of imminent names is still under 10 and post-SpaceX volatility keeps the window cautious — stays yellow

indicators.threshold_text_en: >500 red / 350-500 yellow / <350 green
indicators.note: ICE BofA HY OAS 约 2.63%（263 bps），较上周约 278bps 进一步收窄，远低于长期均值 3.94%、中位数 4.52%；尽管 AI capex 持续烧钱、6 月一度剧烈波动，信用市场对 AI 风险仍无压力，是当前最支撑多头的指标，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: ICE BofA HY OAS is ~2.63% (263 bps), tighter than last week's ~278bps and far below the 3.94% long-run average and 4.52% median; despite ongoing AI capex burn and June's sharp volatility, credit markets show no stress on AI risk — the most bull-supportive indicator right now, stays green

indicators.name_zh: 数据中心 ABS 利差
indicators.threshold_text: 走阔 50bps+ = 红 / 稳定 = 黄 / 收窄 = 绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widening 50bps+ = red / Stable = yellow / Tightening = green
indicators.note: 数据中心 ABS 条件持续宽松：前期利差大幅收窄后于低位企稳，发行火热且被充分吸纳，KBRA 预计 2026 全年利差区间震荡、未见有意义走阔；S&P/Fitch/KBRA 对在建项目基于租户担保给予投资级评级，信用市场对 AI 基建仍无压力，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Data-center ABS conditions stay accommodative: after tightening sharply, spreads have stabilized at tight levels with heavy issuance well absorbed, and KBRA expects them range-bound through 2026 with no meaningful widening; S&P/Fitch/KBRA grant investment-grade ratings on under-construction projects on tenant guarantees — no credit stress on AI infrastructure, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 任何违约/降级=红
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any default/downgrade = red
indicators.note: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda / Applied Digital 90 日内无评级下调或违约；但 CoreWeave 总债务升至约 $14B（上季 $11B、再上季 $7.6B）、未来 12 个月 $9.7B 到期，行业'再融资墙'集中于 2026-27（多为 GPU 抵押债），杠杆与到期集中为潜在隐患——短期零事件，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda / Applied Digital — no downgrades or defaults in 90 days; but CoreWeave's total debt has climbed to ~$14B (from $11B and $7.6B in prior quarters) with $9.7B of maturities within 12 months, and the sector's 'refinancing wall' (mostly GPU-collateralized) clusters in 2026-27 — leverage and maturity concentration are latent risks, yet with zero near-term events it stays green

indicators.name_zh: 全口径债务/Capex 流量比
indicators.threshold_text_en: ≥70% red / 50-70% yellow / <50% green (dot-com peak: 80-100%)
indicators.note: 2026-07-06 完整对账（周度台账机制自本期启用，见 debt_ledger.json）：分子=2026E 全口径 AI 新增债务，Morgan Stanley 最新估约 $570B、5 月底 YTD 已发约 $236B（年化 run-rate 与全年估吻合，为上年同期约 4 倍），含 hyperscaler+JV $250-300B 及 Oracle/Meta/xAI/CoreWeave 约 $120B 表外 SPV；分母=2026E 全口径 compute capex 约 $1.04T（Big4 $725B + Oracle $50B + Apple $13B + neoclouds $60B + 中国 $80B + 主权 $60B + 其他 $48B）。$570B ÷ $1.04T ≈ 55%（区间 50-60%），较 06-14 拆解微升、依据更实；仍低于互联网/电信基建顶 80-100%，维持黄灯。近期大 deal：NVDA $25B 债券（6/15，$85B 认购）、Amazon $17.5B 定期贷款（6/10）、QTS $4.6B 项目债（4 月）。
indicators.note_en: Full reconciliation on 2026-07-06 (weekly deal-ledger now live, see debt_ledger.json): numerator = 2026E all-in new AI debt, latest Morgan Stanley estimate ~$570B with ~$236B already issued through May (annualized run-rate consistent with the FY estimate and ~4x the prior-year pace), incl. $250-300B of hyperscaler+JV issuance and ~$120B of off-balance-sheet SPVs (Oracle/Meta/xAI/CoreWeave); denominator = 2026E all-in compute capex ~$1.04T (Big4 $725B + Oracle $50B + Apple $13B + neoclouds $60B + China $80B + sovereigns $60B + other $48B). $570B ÷ $1.04T ≈ 55% (range 50-60%), a touch above the 06-14 breakdown on firmer inputs; still below the 80-100% dot-com/telecom build-out peak — stays yellow. Recent jumbo deals: NVIDIA $25B bonds (6/15, $85B of orders), Amazon $17.5B term loan (6/10), QTS $4.6B project bond (April).
indicators.source_name: Morgan Stanley + 自下而上拆解

indicators.name_zh: AI 行业 Token 月度环比
indicators.threshold_text: 收缩=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Contraction = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: OpenRouter 月 token 量稳在约 100 万亿（周约 25 万亿、半年 5 倍、YoY 约 4 倍），早 6 月周量已超 33 万亿；agentic 推理为最快增长来源、平台服务超 800 万用户，全产业用量继续加速，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: OpenRouter holds at ~100T tokens/month (~25T weekly, 5x in six months, ~4x YoY), with weekly volume above 33T by early June; agentic inference is the fastest-growing driver and the platform serves 8M+ users — industry-wide usage keeps accelerating, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 环比跌>15%/供过于求=红 / 阴跌=黄 / 稳定或上涨=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: -15%+ MoM / glut = red / Drifting lower = yellow / Stable-to-rising = green
indicators.note: H100 按需约 $2.0-2.5/hr（spot 低至 ~$1.4），1 年期合约价 1 月底突破 $2/hr、2 月再涨 15-20%，3 月起 H100/H200/B200 一度一卡难求；AWS 虽下调挂牌价至多 45%，现货与合约市场整体仍紧俏、无供给过剩迹象；Blackwell 放量后预计温和回落 10-20%，届时关注是否转入阴跌——2000 年暗光纤价格先于电信股崩盘，本指标就是那支温度计，维持绿灯（2026-07-06 新增）
indicators.note_en: H100 on-demand runs ~$2.0-2.5/hr (spot as low as ~$1.4); 1-year contract rates broke above $2/hr in late January and rose another 15-20% through February, and from March H100/H200/B200 capacity was at times unobtainable. AWS cut list prices by up to 45%, yet the spot and contract market stays tight with no sign of glut. Expect a modest 10-20% easing as Blackwell ramps — watch for a sustained drift lower: dark-fiber pricing cracked before telecom stocks did in 2000, and this is that thermometer. Green (added 2026-07-06)

indicators.name_zh: AI 收入增速的二阶导
indicators.threshold_text: 减速=红 / 平稳=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Decel = red / Flat = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic run-rate 由 4 月约 $30B 升至 5 月约 $47B、Series H 以 $965B 估值落定（YoY 约 1400%），月增量持续放大、约 6 周翻倍，已领先 OpenAI 约 $25-33B，二阶导维持正向；唯 Anthropic 含云分销毛收入口径仍存争议，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Anthropic's run-rate climbed from ~$30B in April to ~$47B in May with its Series H closing at a $965B valuation (~1,400% YoY); the monthly increment keeps expanding (doubling roughly every six weeks) and now leads OpenAI's ~$25-33B — the 2nd derivative stays positive, though Anthropic's gross cloud-reseller revenue basis remains contested; stays green

indicators.threshold_text_en: <50% red / 50-65% yellow / >65% green
indicators.note: McKinsey Q1 2026：72% 企业至少 1 项 AI workload 生产化（2024 为 55%、2020 为 20%）；但仅约 28% 已规模化、不足 40% 突破试点，Gartner 预计年底 40% 企业应用嵌入 AI agent；头部部署率高位、深度集成仍在爬坡，无季度新调查沿用，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: McKinsey Q1 2026: 72% of enterprises run at least one AI workload in production (vs 55% in 2024, 20% in 2020); but only ~28% have scaled and under 40% have moved beyond pilots, while Gartner expects 40% of enterprise apps to embed AI agents by year-end — the headline rate is high though deep integration is still climbing; no new quarterly survey, carried over, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 负增长=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Negative = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Oracle FY26 全年 RPO 逐季抬升至约 $638B（+363% YoY），与 OpenAI/xAI/Meta/Nvidia/AMD 多笔数十亿级合约绑定；MSFT 商业 RPO 约为 Oracle 2.4 倍、Google Cloud 积压超 $460B 且持续扩张，合计积压逾 $1.4T，递延需求强劲；但 Oracle 逾 50% RPO 来自 OpenAI，强需求与客户集中并存，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Oracle's FY26 RPO rose each quarter to ~$638B (+363% YoY), tied to multi-billion-dollar contracts with OpenAI/xAI/Meta/Nvidia/AMD; MSFT's commercial RPO is ~2.4x Oracle's and Google Cloud's backlog tops $460B and keeps expanding, bringing the combined pipeline above $1.4T as deferred demand stays robust; but over 50% of Oracle's RPO is from OpenAI — strong demand alongside concentration, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 停滞=红 / 放缓=黄 / 正常或加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Stalled = red / Decelerating = yellow / On-trend or accelerating = green
indicators.note: 前沿进展仍在加速而非放缓：METR 时程倍增时间由全期约 6.3 个月缩至 2024 起约 3 个月，最强模型 50% 时程已达 12-20 小时（TH1.1 套件已近饱和需扩容）；困难基准 90 天内密集刷新——HLE 榜首由 45.7% 升至 53.3%、FrontierMath 破 52%、ARC-AGI-2 上 70%；3 月发布的 ARC-AGI-3 人类 100% vs 前沿 <0.4%，为下一代进展度量留足空间。capex 的第一性支撑（模型持续变好解锁场景）完好，维持绿灯（2026-07-06 新增指标）
indicators.note_en: Frontier progress is accelerating, not slowing: METR's time-horizon doubling time has compressed from ~6.3 months (all-period) to ~3 months since 2024, with the strongest models at 12-20 hour 50% horizons (the TH1.1 suite is nearing saturation and being expanded); hard benchmarks reset densely within 90 days — the HLE lead rose from 45.7% to 53.3%, FrontierMath crossed 52%, ARC-AGI-2 topped 70% — and March's ARC-AGI-3 (humans 100% vs frontier <0.4%) leaves ample headroom for the next generation of measurement. The first-principles support for capex (models keep improving, unlocking use cases) is intact. Green (added 2026-07-06)

indicators.threshold_text: 任何=红 / 调查=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any confirmed = red / Investigation = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 本周无核心 AI 龙头新增正式执法；Burry 持续质疑 Mag7 借延长 GPU 折旧（2-3 年实际、5-6 年账面）虚增利润，属观点而非执法；SEC 对 AI-washing 关注上升、年初曾对某数据情报公司 round-tripping 执法，但均非当前核心 AI 龙头，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: No new formal enforcement against a core AI bellwether this week; Burry keeps alleging Mag7 inflates profits via extended GPU depreciation (2-3 year real life booked over 5-6 years) — a view, not an enforcement action; the SEC's focus on AI-washing is rising (with an early-2026 round-tripping case against a data-intelligence firm), but none target current core AI leaders — stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 加息=红 / 通胀压力=黄 / 降息=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Hike = red / Inflation pressure = yellow / Cut = green
indicators.note: Fed 政策向量仍指向加息：期货路径显示利率年内升向约 4%（10 月约 3.8%，当前 3.50-3.75%）、18 名委员中 9 人预期年内至少加息一次，核心 PCE 预期 3.3%、能源涨价推升加息预期；新任主席 Warsh 反复强调'价格稳定'、态度偏鹰。虽 7 月会议约 75.6% 概率维持，但方向明确向上，对极度拉伸的估值构成实质压制，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: The Fed's policy vector still points to hikes: the futures path rises toward ~4% by year-end (~3.8% by October, from 3.50-3.75% now), 9 of 18 officials pencil at least one 2026 hike, core PCE is seen at 3.3%, and rising energy prices lift hike expectations; new Chair Warsh keeps stressing 'price stability' with a hawkish tone. Although the July meeting is ~75.6% hold, the direction is clearly up — a real headwind for extremely stretched valuations, stays red

indicators.name_zh: 资本开支指引市场反应
indicators.threshold_text: 系统性惩罚=红 / 偶发=黄 / 奖励=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Systematic punishment = red / Episodic = yellow / Rewarded = green
indicators.note: 市场反应本周由'系统性惩罚'转回'奖励'：6/22-27 的 AI 回调至 Q2 末已完全反转，晨星 Q2 美股大盘 +15.52%、AI 交易强势复苏领涨，费半年内 +47%、纳米科技指数单季 +99.25%（15 年最大）；7 月 AI 芯片股再添约 2 万亿美元市值，'资本开支海啸'重被奖励。虽'回报证据'的审视情绪仍在（6 月抛售的估值/回报担忧未根本消除），但当前价格反应明确正向，由红转绿
indicators.note_en: The market reaction swung from 'systematic punishment' back to 'rewarded' this week: the June 22-27 AI pullback fully reversed by quarter-end, with Morningstar's Q2 US market index up 15.52% led by a strong AI-trade revival, the SOX up 47% YTD, and the Nanotech index posting its biggest quarterly gain in 15 years (+99.25%); AI chip stocks added ~$2T in market value in July as the 'capex tsunami' is rewarded again. A 'show me the returns' scrutiny lingers (June's valuation/return worries are not fully gone), but the current price reaction is clearly positive — flips red to green

indicators.threshold_text: 普遍承认过热=红 / 部分=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widespread acknowledgment = red / Partial = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 对冲表态持续但未成一致：Altman 直言小盘 AI 估值'非理性、insane'、'必有人巨亏'；Dimon 称'far more worried than others'、'不少钱很可能会亏'；Burry 称延长 GPU 折旧为'当代最常见骗局之一'；但 Dimon、Pichai 等仍强调 AI 长期'会兑现'、CEO 未集体收手，未达全体承认过热，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: Hedging persists but is not universal: Altman calls small-cap AI valuations 'irrational, insane' and warns 'someone will lose a phenomenal amount'; Dimon says he is 'far more worried than others' and that 'a lot of the money will probably be lost'; Burry calls extended GPU depreciation 'one of the more common frauds of the modern era'; yet Dimon and Pichai still insist AI 'will pay off' long term and CEOs have not collectively pulled back — short of a universal 'overheated' consensus, stays yellow
